odoo-brl.notes: BRL engine: chunked 4-way classify (double-profile check_module_exists) + deterministic cost (cost-config.json) + RTM deliverables. Phase 0 bootstrap uses profile_inspect(summary) for profile composition; Phase C uses impact_analysis to ground Extension-M/L tier in real blast radius. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-addon-diff.notes: CE/EE/distribution diff is profile-scoped: pin profile (set_active_profile) + profile_inspect(repos) to know each profile's real repo coverage; entity_lookup attributes a field's source module (CE vs EE). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-campaign-plan.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for feature claim grounding only; profile_inspect verifies a 'competitive displacement' angle against the real platform inventory.

odoo-capability-proof.notes: module_inspect(summary) adds architecture scope (N models/views) to the proof package beyond field-level evidence.

odoo-competitive-brief.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect turns the capability matrix's 'your platform' column from training-data assertion into indexed fact. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-content-draft.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for grounding feature claims in content.

odoo-customization-inventory.notes: profile_inspect(modules) enumerates the profile's modules in one call (Round 0); module_inspect(dependencies) + find_deprecated_usage ground upgrade-risk in real dependency graph + deprecated-API scan. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-deal-followup.notes: Standalone-first. check_module_exists optional — only when user requests feature fact-check.

odoo-demo-recording.notes: Standalone-first. OSM optional — only to plan the demo click path; video capture is browser-MCP side. set_active_version pins the target version so view/URL paths are not resolved against latest-indexed.

odoo-deploy-checklist.notes: Domain 5 grounds CLI flags for the target version via cli_help (was instructed in SKILL.md but undeclared).

odoo-deprecation-audit.notes: set_active_profile scopes find_deprecated_usage(profile_name) to the customer's modules instead of default Odoo CE scope.

odoo-discovery-summary.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect(modules) verifies profile-owned modules in one call (Round 3.5), upgrading Confidence-Low rows. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-feature-highlights.notes: module_inspect(summary) gives concrete architecture numbers (N models/views) for marketing copy.

odoo-frontend-design.notes: Knowledge-only design-quality skill (leaf, no agent spawn): the senior-frontend-designer expertise that odoo-solution-design (architect) and odoo-coding (coder) LOAD for the UI/UX of a change, and the quality bar odoo-ui-review rates against. resolve_stylesheet + find_style_override ground design decisions in the target version's real theme tokens; it points to skills/_shared/odoo-frontend-fidelity.md as the SSOT for the verification mechanics rather than restating them. min_server 0.7.0 for the stylesheet tools.

odoo-gap-analysis.notes: module_inspect distinguishes Configuration vs Extension via view/JS inventory, not just the field list.

odoo-objection-handling.notes: module_inspect(summary) strengthens the ACA Counter table with module scope numbers.

odoo-onboarding.notes: After profile selection, profile_inspect(modules) records the real module inventory into .odoo-ai/context.md so downstream skills need not re-derive it. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-override-finding.notes: lookup_core_api + api_version_diff verify a method's API stability / signature change from the index; find_examples grounds the override template in real indexed code instead of training memory.

odoo-solution-design.notes: Slim SKILL.md for the design bundle — companion to the odoo-solution-architect agent. Designs the technical solution (approach / data model / override strategy / module structure) before any code is written. impact_analysis grounds blast-radius in Risks; find_override_point grounds super() position; validate_* verify the proposed ORM chains so the coder inherits a verified design. min_server 0.13.1 for impact_analysis + profile_inspect.

odoo-risk-overview.notes: profile_inspect(modules) auto-enumerates the in-scope modules in Round 0. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-intake.notes: Pure text routing and brainstorm — no MCP tool calls. Tool names mentioned in routing table discriminators are references to OTHER skills' tools, not invocations by intake itself.

wave.notes: Depth-0 git-wave orchestration skill — no MCP tools; spawns WI subagents over worktrees + cherry-pick + /code-review + squash. Outputs to .odoo-ai/wave/ (gitignored).

odoo-ui-review.notes: Rendered-UI review (aesthetics/functional/stability/a11y/performance). Browser MCP (chrome-devtools) captures the live screen; OSM grounds findings in code. Tool list synced to companion agent agents/odoo-ui-reviewer.md.

odoo-version-diff.notes: find_examples grounds Added-API descriptions in real indexed usage.

odoo-visual-regression.notes: Screenshot baseline + diff between two states/builds. OSM scopes the comparison via blast radius; browser MCP captures and diffs. resolve_stylesheet adds the @import-chain blast radius; set_active_version pins the target version.

odoo-support-triage.notes: Composition skill — no MCP tools called directly. NL-dispatches to odoo-debug (bug path) and odoo-feature-check (feature-request path) via description-match. All outputs to .odoo-ai/support/ (gitignored, confidentiality-safe).

odoo-qa-suite.notes: Phase 1 grounds test mechanics (test class, tag syntax, --test-enable/--test-tags) via OSM set_active_version + cli_help for the target version; Phase 2 NL-dispatches to odoo-deploy-checklist. Outputs to .odoo-ai/qa/.

run-driver.notes: Depth-0 drive-to-done loop: walks the RUN-DAG in .odoo-ai/run-<id>.json, dispatches each node, reads its Continuation Contract, advances to DONE/BLOCKED/NEEDS_CONTEXT. Pure orchestration - no MCP tools of its own.

odoo-test-writer.notes: Writes executable Odoo test files (TransactionCase/Form or Hoot/QUnit per version); tests protect business behavior, not current code.

odoo-security-audit.notes: Audits Odoo code for security issues (SQLi/XSS/access-control/CSRF/deserialization/secrets); graded findings report, no fix.

odoo-data-migration.notes: Writes Odoo pre/post-migration scripts + verification plan; does NOT execute against an instance (that is a separate human-gated deploy step).

odoo-perf-audit.notes: Audits Odoo code for performance anti-patterns (N+1, missing prefetch, unindexed domains, compute thrash); findings + remediation.

odoo-pricing-proposal.notes: Builds a customer-facing pricing proposal (license tier + implementation cost bands + SLA + terms); rate numbers are AE-filled placeholders, not hardcoded.

odoo-rfp-response.notes: Rates Odoo compliance per RFP requirement into a Yes/Partial/Roadmap/No matrix with evidence + executive fit summary.

odoo-customer-health.notes: Assesses an existing Odoo customer's health (score + churn risk + upsell + next-touch) for customer-success/retention.

odoo-debug.notes: Front-door debug orchestrator. Stays light on tools - pins version + quick layer classification, then dispatches specialist debug agents (odoo-backend-debugger OSM-only; odoo-ui-debugger browser, serial-exclusive). Heavy OSM localization happens inside the agents. Writes run notes to .odoo-ai/debug/ (gitignored).

odoo-coder.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-coding slim SKILL.md (the unified coding front door). Tool list from agents/odoo-coder.md frontmatter. find_override_point grounds super() position for method overrides; module_inspect gives whole-module picture.

odoo-solution-architect.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-solution-design slim SKILL.md. Runs on OPUS (cross-file architecture reasoning). Tool list = the FULL odoo-semantic surface (25 tools) so one read-only design pass can cover backend, frontend, upgrade/migration, and profile/module-inventory facets. Read-only design role: produces a Technical Design Document under .odoo-ai/designs/, never production code (Write is allowed only for the design-doc artifact). impact_analysis grounds blast-radius; find_override_point grounds super() position; resolve_stylesheet/find_style_override ground the frontend design tokens; find_deprecated_usage/api_version_diff ground upgrade designs; validate_* verify proposed ORM chains before the coder inherits the design.

odoo-code-reviewer.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-code-review slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-code-reviewer.md frontmatter. Runs in two modes: per-module (sonnet, deep line-level review) and synthesis (opus, cross-module integration over the dependency closure). module_inspect(dependencies) walks the forward closure and impact_analysis the reverse (dependents) for the synthesis pass; find_examples gives evidence code for the Suggested-Pattern section; api_version_diff for cross-version review; find_style_override + resolve_stylesheet for the SCSS review path. Writes its report only under .odoo-ai/reviews/ (Write tool), never repo source.

odoo-ui-reviewer.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-ui-review slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-ui-reviewer.md frontmatter. set_active_version pins the version (was discovered via list_available_versions but never pinned); api_version_diff explains version-specific token changes in the design-system lens.

odoo-frontend-coder.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-coding slim SKILL.md (the unified coding front door). Tool list from agents/odoo-frontend-coder.md frontmatter. entity_lookup verifies an OWL component method exists before patch().

odoo-backend-debugger.notes: Agent bundle - backend runtime debugger dispatched by odoo-debug. OSM-only (no browser). Tool list from agents/odoo-backend-debugger.md frontmatter (Read/Grep/Bash omitted - not MCP).

odoo-ui-debugger.notes: Agent bundle - frontend runtime debugger dispatched by odoo-debug (absorbs the former UI-debugging skill). Drives chrome-devtools browser MCP (serial-exclusive, not tracked here); OSM tools localize the cause. Tool list from agents/odoo-ui-debugger.md frontmatter.

orchestration._doc: SSOT (single source of truth) for orchestration metadata of every skills/<dir>. Consumed by gen_surface.py -> docs/reference/ORCHESTRATION-MAP.md + orchestration-digest.txt, and validated by check_orchestration.py. spawn_class: leaf (runs inline) | orchestrator-nl (chains other skills via natural-language dispatch, no Agent-tool spawn) | spawner-agent (dispatch a named agent at depth0->1) | spawner-wave (depth0->1->2 worktree fan-out). depth_policy: any-depth | depth0-only (must only be invoked from the main agent, never from a subagent). stack: backend | frontend | fullstack | none (drives backend<->frontend routing). instance_touching: true when the skill emits odoo-bin / builds or updates an instance (must ground CLI via OSM cli_help per target version). output_mode: chat-only (emits to chat, skip Plan Mode) | writes-files (persists file artifact, requires Plan Mode); SSOT here, replaces hardcoded chat-only lists. default_gate_tier: L0 (read-only/chat auto-pass) | L1 (writes .odoo-ai/ internal, auto-pass under --auto) | L2 (irreversible/outward: instance_touching or spawner-wave - ALWAYS human gate; dial cannot lower). Per-node override lives in run-<id>.json, not here.

spawns: (Phase R: ≤2 read-only recon agents — Explore or specialist in read-only mode; no writes, no further spawn)

(anonymous read-only fan-out workers via Agent tool, explicit model per phase haiku/sonnet/opus; read-only on Odoo source, write only findings under .odoo-ai/survey/, no further spawn — see skills/_shared/concurrency-guard.md Mode B)
(dispatch: Workflow pipeline rolling-window, explicit model per work-item per tier table haiku/sonnet/opus/fable; Agent-tool weighted-batch fallback - see skills/_shared/concurrency-guard.md Mode B)
